name: websearch
description: Search the web for information, news, documentation, tutorials, or answers. Use when the user wants to: search the internet, look something up online, find information about a topic, get current news, find documentation, research something, or needs up-to-date information that may not be in the knowledge base.

request.description: The search query or question to look up online

num_results.description: Number of results to return (default: 5, max: 10)
